title: sternbergia lutea subsp. greuteriana
intro: Sternbergia lutea subsp. greuteriana, also known as the autumn onion or striped autumn star, is a bulbous perennial plant species belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. The herbal preparations of Sternbergia lutea subsp. greuteriana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional folk medicine.
